repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.database.mysql: InnoDB gap/next-key locks, clustered primary index, binlog replication, REPEATABLE READ, utf8mb4, online DDL
render a chart in the React dashboard

retrieval_query: InnoDB gap lock clustered primary index binlog replication utf8mb4 online DDL isolation

validation_smoke.name: code.database.mysql L3 validation smoke
signals: SHOW ENGINE INNODB STATUS confirms the expected lock waits cleared after the change
binlog position advances on the replica and Seconds_Behind_Master returns to zero
EXPLAIN shows the query uses the intended index instead of a full clustered scan
a concurrency test proves the gap-locked range no longer blocks unrelated inserts

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.database.mysql diagnosis smoke
signals: deadlock section of SHOW ENGINE INNODB STATUS names two transactions on overlapping next-key ranges
replica lag climbs while a single long transaction holds the binlog
INFORMATION_SCHEMA.INNODB_TRX shows a transaction blocked on a gap lock
auto-increment counter jumps after rollbacks, leaving visible id gaps
Lock wait timeout exceeded errors cluster on one hot secondary index
